name: US Soccer Federation
why_target: Sole governing body of soccer in the United States; greenlights or signals every grassroots channel; co-host federation for WC2026
notes: 1801 S Prairie Ave Chicago IL 60616; CEO JT Batson; Comms VP Neil Buethe; media via communications@ussoccer.com

name: US Soccer Foundation
why_target: Largest charitable arm of US soccer; runs Soccer for Success in 400+ cities and operates the Safe Places to Play grant network; perfect WC2026 youth-engagement multiplier
notes: 1133 19th St NW Suite 200 Washington DC 20036; CEO Ed Foster-Simeon; comms@ussoccerfoundation.org also valid

name: US Youth Soccer Association (USYSA)
why_target: Largest youth sport organization in the US with ~2.5M registered players across 55 state associations and 7000+ leagues; one yes here cascades to every state member
notes: 9220 World Cup Way Frisco TX 75033; CEO Skip Gilbert; media via comms@usyouthsoccer.org (unverified pattern)

name: US Club Soccer
why_target: Alternative national sanctioning body for ~600K youth players including the ECNL pipeline; parallel channel to USYSA
notes: 9624 Highway 17 N Suite 100 Charleston SC 29456; CEO Mike Cullina; staff format {first}.{last}@usclubsoccer.org (unverified)

name: American Youth Soccer Organization (AYSO)
why_target: ~400K youth players nationwide with strong volunteer-parent base; WC2026 viewing-party engine for every AYSO region
notes: 19750 S Vermont Ave Suite 200 Torrance CA 90502; CEO Robert Koger; media via marketing@ayso.org (unverified pattern)

name: National Women's Soccer League (NWSL)
why_target: Top US women's pro league; FIFA Women's WC 2027 also looming so WC2026 men's pool engages the same fan crossover; broadcast deal with CBS+Amazon+ESPN+ION drives audience
notes: 488 Madison Ave 15th Floor New York NY 10022; Commissioner Jessica Berman; comms via media@nwslsoccer.com (unverified)

name: United Soccer League (USL)
why_target: Parent body for USL Championship USL League One USL League Two and the new USL Super League; ~50 clubs across the Sun Belt and Midwest; one yes cascades to the entire USL pyramid
notes: 615 Channelside Drive Suite 200 Tampa FL 33602; CEO Alec Papadakis; press via communications@uslsoccer.com

name: MLS Players Association
why_target: Player union covering all MLS rostered players; co-signal moves locker rooms which moves club socials
notes: 529 14th St NW Suite 1280 Washington DC 20045; Executive Director Bob Foose

name: United Soccer Coaches
why_target: Largest soccer coaches association in the world with ~30K members from rec to pro; perfect WC2026 educator channel
notes: 30 West Pershing Rd Suite 350 Kansas City MO 64108; CEO Jamie McCloskey; media@unitedsoccercoaches.org (unverified)

name: United Premier Soccer League (UPSL)
why_target: 400+ adult amateur clubs across 30+ states; minimal gatekeeping; high-engagement community game
notes: Operates Conference structure with semi-pro and pro pathway

why_target: ~100 semi-pro clubs across the US; strong supporters culture at member clubs (Detroit City FC alum and similar)
